payload.diagnosis: Stage12 counted source/episode horizon availability, but Stage13 required per-agent causal past plus target mask in all-agent windows; no row satisfied that stricter policy.
likely_causes: only-visible agents and target masks were not aligned for t+100
Stage12 episode-level verified_t100 does not imply per-agent complete target rows
long-horizon target exists at source-track level but can be lost in all-agent window masks

rebuild.reason_for_previous_mismatch: Stage12 all-agent windows lost per-agent t+100 target alignment; Stage14 rebuilds around source-track primary agents.

payload.stage14_training_note: Deterministic bounded-residual search reused for Stage14 multimodal scaffold. Visual/raster branches are represented in data/scene packs but are not proven effective yet.

rows.evidence: At least one local pedestrian/drone source has trajectories plus scene context.

Deterministic residuals are bounded; no SMC/stochastic rollout enabled.
